rationale: Educ. Code §45.036 governs attorney general examination of school district bonds. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: All bonds issued pursuant to this subchapter, and the appropriate proceedings authorizing their issuance, shall be submitted to the attorney general for examination.
_note: Rule text concerns bond examination procedures; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption levels.
